name: Obstacle Remover
description: Highlight obstacle cells on the board and remove one by tapping it.

name: Node Pair Eraser
description: Highlight all nodes on the board and remove one pair by tapping a node.

name: Move Reducer
description: Reduces your current move count by 3. Cannot be used if moves used is less than 3.

name: Time Extender
description: Adds 20 seconds to the remaining time.
